revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24699703697|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Fuchiuchino Shrine
| native_name = 藤内神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Fuchiuchino Shrine
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Fuchiuchino Shrine'''|藤内神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hitachi Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|lt=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|qid=Q135038714|1=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Hitachi Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Hitachi Province|ja|常陸国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11481683|1=List of Shikinaisha in Hitachi Province}}
** Series ordinal: 19
** P155: {{ill|Q11644289|ltq=Q11644289|qid=Q11644289|1=Sakatsura Isosaki Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Ihafuneno Shrine|lt=Ihafuneno Shrine|qid=Q135039767|1=Ihafuneno Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==
